task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine interface shows 'Orion Avionics' in the top header, project menu, or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: View the issues assigned to the source version 'v2.4-stable'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An issue list is displayed with a filter applied for 'Target version' set to 'v2.4-stable', showing both open and closed issues.

task_completion.description: Move open or unfinished issues to the target version 'v2.5-beta'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent uses the bulk edit feature or edits individual open issues, changing the 'Target version' dropdown to 'v2.5-beta', and saves the changes.

task_completion.description: Ensure closed or completed issues remain in 'v2.4-stable'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue list for 'v2.4-stable' shows only closed issues, or the version summary for 'v2.4-stable' shows that closed issues are still attached to it while open issues are gone.

task_completion.description: Change the status of 'v2.4-stable' to 'Closed' or 'Locked'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the project settings under the 'Versions' tab, the status dropdown for 'v2.4-stable' is set to 'Closed' or 'Locked', and the change is saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Redmine web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible displaying the Redmine application, with clicks and navigation occurring within the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing curl commands, rails console, or database queries modifying the issues or versions.

integrity.description: Changes were genuinely applied in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Green success flash messages (e.g., 'Successful update') appear after saving changes to issues and versions in the Redmine UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Redmine. The project name is 'Orion Avionics'. The source version containing the initial issues is 'v2.4-stable', and the target version for open issues is 'v2.5-beta'.
